jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Senior Product Designer to join our growing team.

You will own end-to-end design for a core product area.
jobs.requirements:
• 5+ years of product design experience
  • Portfolio showing shipped work
jobs.benefits: Stock options, unlimited PTO, and a real craft culture.

jobs.title: Design Engineer
jobs.description: Design-engineer hybrid role. You will prototype in code.
